mapper.sql: id, knowledge_base_id, resource_type, title, description, url, local_path, cover_url, size, duration, created_at, updated_at, creator_id, is_deleted, metadata
mapper.select: SELECT resource_type as resourceType, COUNT(*) as count FROM knowledge_resource WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY resource_type
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_resource SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
